content.en:
Last time, the three reincarnation clans used the prison to break the prison and leave a lot of pieces behind.

Soon after, the Reincarnation Golden Worm, the Titan Giant Worm, and the Devouring Black Worm swept through the entire Reincarnation Domain, so the three reincarnation clans must not have time to comprehend these fragments.

So, these fragments must still be in their hands.

As for whether they are willing to hand it over or not, it is not for them to decide!

Strength is everything!

......

Reincarnation of the source family.

Ye Tian came here first, and he had to take away the prison fragments obtained by the Reincarnation Source Clan first.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian was unabashed, and directly descended to the reincarnation source domain, and ran directly to the hinterland of the reincarnation source clan.

"Who?"

Jaw Ancestor, Yi Ancestor and many other Origin Upper Realm Overlords who broke the boundary of the Nine Times appeared one after another, and almost all of them were injured, but they still appeared.

Just because Ye Tian's breath was not a creature of the Reincarnation Domain, this naturally made them shocked, jealous, and even terrified.

At first, they thought that Ye Tian was an existence outside the prison, but when they looked closely, they found that the aura on Ye Tian's body came from the land of eternity.

"Your Excellency is the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Land of Eternity?"

Jaw Zu asked.

"That's good!" Ye Tian smiled: "I am the Endless Lord of the Eternal Land, and I am here for one thing this time, and that is to ask for your prison fragments!"

"Prison Fragments !!"

Jaw Ancestor's face changed, they didn't expect what Ye Tian's goal was.

The key is, how did Ye Tian know!

There is almost no contact between the reincarnation domain and the land of the eternal shore, and at most only a few slave races will enter and leave the reincarnation domain and the land of the eternal land.

It stands to reason that the information of their reincarnation tribes cannot be known to the land on the other side of eternity!

But there is no point in pursuing this issue now.

"Prison fragments, it is impossible to give them to you!"

Jaw Ancestor said coldly.

Although Ye Tian's aura was very strong, his cultivation did not seem to be high, and he might not even be his opponent.

Such an Origin Upper Realm Overlord also wants to threaten the Reincarnation Origin Clan?

If it weren't for the injury, plus he didn't know Ye Tian's specific strength, otherwise he would definitely make a move.

"If Your Excellency doesn't leave, then don't blame us for being rude!"

Jaw Ancestor and the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords who had broken the boundaries of the Nine Realms exuded a terrifying Origin Aura and came towards Ye Tian to suppress them.

"Looks like we still have to fight!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

In an instant.

Ye Tian performed the Supreme Dao Flow Body Technique, killing in front of the Jaw Ancestor at an incomparably terrifying speed.

Then, with a casual slap of his hand, he directly slapped the jaw ancestor away, and his flesh exploded directly.

But he kept his hand and did not kill the jaw ancestor, but only severely injured him.

I saw that the body of the jaw ancestor was healed, but there were still countless cracks, and it was difficult to heal completely.

"Kill!"

The other Origin Upper Realm Overlords who broke the boundary of the nine times also made a move, but they were all swept out by Ye Tian with one blow.

In the blink of an eye, these Origin Upper Realm Overlords were all severely injured by Ye Tian.

"You're too weak!"

Ye Tian said.

"Stop!"

Jaw Ancestor and they stopped one after another, not daring to do it anymore, and in fact, they didn't have the strength to do it.

They knew very well that if Ye Tian was willing, he could easily slaughter them cleanly.

"Prison fragments, take them out!"

Ye Tian ordered again.

This time they handed it over one by one, leaving no one behind, and they didn't dare to keep one.

Ye Tian put away these prison fragments and prepared to leave.

At this time, the Jaw Ancestor boldly asked, "May I ask Your Excellency, have you comprehended the kind of rules contained in the fragments of the prison?" "

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

When Jaw Zu and the others heard this, they were shocked, but they didn't expect that someone really understood this kind of rule.

"May I ask what kind of rule this is, if you want to surpass the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, do you have to comprehend this kind of rule?" Jaw Ancestor asked again.

"This is the rule of the Supreme Dao!" Ye Tian said lightly: "As for the realm above the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, whether I want to comprehend this kind of rule, I don't know, after all, I haven't broken through!"

With that, he departed.

"I didn't expect that such an Origin Upper Realm Overlord would be born in the Land of Eternity, and his strength was even stronger than the original Origin Ancestor!! "Jaw Ancestor muttered.

Yizu shook his head and said: "No matter how strong it is, we are in a prison here, there is no hope for him to stay here, even if he breaks out of the prison, he will be killed." Unless, he can break the shackles here and become an existence above the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, maybe he can hope to shatter the prison and leave here. "

"Maybe there's really hope!" said another Origin Upper Realm Overlord, "If he really rushes out, maybe we can also hope to get out!"

......

Not long after, Ye Tian came to the Reincarnation Clan.

Today's loss of the reincarnation of the Terrasity is smaller, after all, the Reincarnation Trek is immortal and immortal, and it will not really fall, but many of the Origin Upper Realm overlords are still slowly recovering, and the physical body has not yet been condensed, only the Origin Mark remains in the Origin of the Reincarnation Domain.

As a result, the number of reincarnation tribes left at the headquarters of the reincarnation tribe is very rare.

After Ye Tian descended, he directly showed his terrifying strength, forcibly suppressed them, and took away the prison fragments from their bodies.

And at the same time.

The Reincarnation Heavenly Clan also got the news, and after Ye Tian descended, they directly handed over those prison fragments.

That's it.

Ye Tian obtained all the prison fragments, and then left the Reincarnation Domain and returned to the Tianshan Pavilion on the other side of eternity.

After that, he contemplated these prison fragments in the Tianshan Pavilion.

This time, the fragments he had obtained, in terms of volume, were ten times as many as he had obtained from the Origin Ancestor.

If all these prison fragments are consumed, there is a high probability that his Supreme Dao rules will improve a little, and his strength will also increase a lot.

In the following years, Ye Tian was contemplating the supreme rules in these prison fragments.

Time flies.

Before you know it, another 200 million primeval years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already consumed all the prison fragments, and the Supreme Dao Rule Realm had improved a bit.

And his cultivation has also improved a bit, and he has also created a variety of supernatural powers involving the rules of the Supreme Dao.

However, another bad thing happened.

"The origin of the Reincarnation Domain and the Eternal Beyond Land has been quickly absorbed again, and it should be the existence outside the prison that has repaired the prison!"

Ye Tian guessed.

"Now my strength is much stronger than in the past, I have to go to the inside of the Origin Ancestor's body again and enter the biggest rift!"

Ye Tian decided.

Wow!

He went straight to the Hurricane Sea, and then entered the Origin Ancestor Treasure World, and came to the Greatest Rift.
